strings.help_title: I can help with Firefly in normal language.
strings.help_intro: Ask for balances, summaries, recent transactions, categories, budgets, recurring items, or draft new entries. I will interpret the request and route the safest action.
strings.help_commands_hint: If you want the explicit slash-command reference, use /commands.
strings.help_periods: You can ask about this month, last month, or a custom window like from 01-04-2026 to 15-04-2026. If you do not specify a date or month, I use today or the current month depending on the request.
strings.help_write_safety: By default writes are dry-run. Add live=yes or confirm the draft to write for real.
strings.help_high_value: Use yes_high_value=yes when a real transaction is above the high-value threshold.
strings.commands_intro: Normal language is usually easier, but these direct commands are available too.
strings.commands_periods: Period-aware commands accept month=YYYY-MM or from=DD-MM-YYYY to=DD-MM-YYYY. If you omit the period, I use today or the current month.
strings.commands_natural_hint: Send help if you want natural-language examples instead.
strings.startup_ok: Firefly bridge is healthy. Bot ready. /help shows what you can ask.
strings.startup_warn: Firefly bridge started with a warning. /help shows what you can ask.
strings.startup_gateway_unhealthy: I started, but the PicoClaw gateway is still not healthy on localhost:18790. Check docker compose logs.
strings.need_more_detail: I need a bit more detail to do that safely.
strings.no_pending_draft: There is no pending draft to commit.
strings.receipt_unreadable: I could not read that receipt safely yet. Send a short note with the image, for example 'receipt for coffee paid with cash', or type the expense normally.
strings.draft_category_confirm: Proposed category: {category}. Is that correct? (yes / no / type a name)
strings.draft_category_select_hint: Type a number, a name, or 'skip'.
strings.draft_budget_suggest: Related budget found: {budget}. Associate it? (yes / no)
strings.draft_review_confirm_hint: Say 'ok' to save, or 'cancel' to discard.
strings.draft_correction_hint: You can also say: 'change amount to X', 'change category', 're-read'.
strings.draft_no_category: I couldn't determine a category. Which one should I use? (type a name, or 'skip')
strings.receipt_counting: I found {count} transactions in the image.
strings.receipt_amount_unreadable: I can't read the amount. Can you tell me?
strings.transfer_missing_source: I need the account to transfer from.
strings.transfer_missing_destination: I need the account to transfer to.
strings.router_down_warning: Router down. Try /help or a direct command.
strings.income_no_source: Income recorded without a source account (revenue side). Add one via /train if needed.
strings.amount_missing: I still need the amount. Example: add an expense of 12.50 for lunch.

command_lines: /setup - show the current finance profile; accepts status/reset/start
/train - teach account defaults, payment aliases, and budget behavior
/summary - summary for YYYY-MM or from=01-04-2026 to=15-04-2026
/recent - recent transactions; accepts days/query or from=01-04-2026 to=15-04-2026 query="coffee"
/search <keyword> - search transactions from the last 90 days
/topcategories, /budgetreport - spending and budget reports; accepts month, graph, or date range
/expense, /income, /transfer - direct transaction drafts with amount, description, source, destination, category, and budget
/backup - send a JSON backup to this chat
/maintenance - cleanup mode for accounts, categories, and budgets
help_natural_examples: how much money do i have
show me my summary for this month
show me my summary for last month
show me the categories I spent the most on this month
show me the categories i spent the most on last month
make a spending graph from 01-04-2026 to 15-04-2026
make a cashflow graph for this month
show recent coffee transactions from 01-03-2026 to 31-03-2026
set groceries budget to 350 this month
add an expense of 10 for lunch paid with cash
add an expense of 2.20 for coffee
send a receipt photo and I will try to prepare a draft
